column1: Absolutely love this dress! The fit is perfect and the fabric quality is amazing. Highly recommend!
Best purchase ever! Great quality, fast shipping, and looks exactly like the pictures. Five stars!
So happy with this item! Comfortable, stylish, and well-made. Will definitely buy again.
Perfect! Exceeded my expectations in every way. The color is beautiful and fits like a dream.
Outstanding quality and customer service. This company never disappoints!
Terrible quality. The material feels cheap and it started falling apart after one wash. Very disappointed.
Do not buy this! Runs extremely small, poor stitching, and nothing like the description. Waste of money.
Worst purchase I've ever made. Arrived damaged and customer service was unhelpful. Returning immediately.
Horrible experience. The fabric is scratchy, the fit is awful, and it looks nothing like the photo.
Complete disaster. Poor quality, overpriced, and took forever to arrive. Would give zero stars if I could.
It's okay. Nothing special but does the job. Pretty average overall.
Decent quality for the price. Not amazing but not terrible either. Just fine.
Meh. It's alright I guess. Fits okay, looks okay. Nothing to write home about.
Love the color but the sizing is way off. Had to return and reorder a different size.
Great fabric quality but runs very small. Make sure to size up!
